# References
**Author:** Arnas

- [Window Creation](http://www.directxtutorial.com/Lesson.aspx?lessonid=9-1-3) - Used for creating a window.

- [Camera](https://rovecoder.net/article/directx-11/camera) - Used for the original camera.

- [DirectX 12 Triangle](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=7kPlfH8mOWE) - Used for creating a triangle in DirectX 12.

- [Volumetric Lighting](https://developer.nvidia.com/gpugems/gpugems3/part-ii-light-and-shadows/chapter-13-volumetric-light-scattering-post-process) - Used for volumetric lighting scattering via post processing.

- [Volumetric Lighting v2](https://developer.nvidia.com/volumetriclighting) - Used for expanding on the previous system.

- [Noise Generation](https://gist.github.com/davidar/5f9677a0ccfbd63d7a8657ad9af3a856) - Used to get Hash31 noise.

- [Asset Loading (TinyObjLoader)](https://github.com/tinyobjloader/tinyobjloader) - Used to create the current object loader.

- [Asset Loading (TinyGLTF)](https://github.com/syoyo/tinygltf) - Possible to use in future for improvement to object loader.
